overview.name: Multipart Payload
overview.description:
This scenario verifies API support for multipart payload enrichment.
Test flow includes: 1. Send POST request with JSON payload and create entity. 2. Extract created entity ID from response. 3. Send multipart request with file and optional text to enrich existing entity. 4. Verify multipart response status = 200. 5. Send GET request by ID and verify response status = 200. 6. Validate response body contains uploaded file metadata and updated values.
This scenario validates: - Entity creation before multipart processing - Multipart file upload to existing entity - File metadata extraction - Entity enrichment flow - Response body consistency

http.comment: Step 1. Create base entity before multipart upload
Step 3-4. Send multipart request to enrich existing entity
Step 5-6. Send GET request and validate multipart-enriched entity
